description: A repo-audited candidate geometric completion framework for the Standard Model's flavor, channel, generation, response, and threshold architecture. Full derivation of the Standard Model remains an open objective.
notes: All rights reserved. Metadata checked during Full BHSM v1.0 Candidate repository status refresh. No release publication is performed by this metadata update.
title: Berger-Hopf Standard Model: A No-Retuning Geometric Reinterpretation Framework for Standard Model Flavor, Couplings, and Generations
